title: Using latest is prone to errors if the image will ever update. Pin the version explicitly to a release tag
evidence: Using latest is prone to errors if the image will ever update. Pin the version explicitly to a release tag

title: Last USER should not be root
evidence: Last USER should not be root

title: Pin versions in apt get install. Instead of `apt-get install <package>` use `apt-get install <package>=<version>`
evidence: Pin versions in apt get install. Instead of `apt-get install <package>` use `apt-get install <package>=<version>`

title: Delete the apt-get lists after installing something
evidence: Delete the apt-get lists after installing something

title: Set the SHELL option -o pipefail before RUN with a pipe in it. If you are using /bin/sh in an alpine image or if your shell is symlinked to busybox then consider explicitly setting your SHELL to /bin/ash, or disable this check
evidence: Set the SHELL option -o pipefail before RUN with a pipe in it. If you are using /bin/sh in an alpine image or if your shell is symlinked to busybox then consider explicitly setting your SHELL to /bin/

title: Double quote to prevent globbing and word splitting.
evidence: Double quote to prevent globbing and word splitting.
